name: Chocolate Chip Cheesecake Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and melted margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, flour, eggs (one at a time), stirring well after each addition. Blend in sour cream and vanilla.
4. Stir in chocolate chips. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 55 minutes.
6. Loosen the edges of the cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan.
7. Chill thoroughly. Garnish with whipped cream and fresh mint leaves, if desired.
